mapper.sql: select o.*, (select count(1) from fp_logical_object_instance i where i.tenant_id = o.tenant_id and i.logical_object_id = o.id) as instance_count, (select count(1) from fp_logical_object_instance i where i.tenant_id = o.tenant_id and i.logical_object_id = o.id and i.status in ('RUNNING','ACTIVE','ALIVE')) as active_instance_count, (select max(i.last_seen_at) from fp_logical_object_instance i where i.tenant_id = o.tenant_id and i.logical_object_id = o.id) as last_seen_at from fp_logical_object o
mapper.select: order by o.updated_at desc limit #{pageSize} offset #{offset}
mapper.insert: insert into fp_logical_object (id, tenant_id, object_code, object_name, object_type, env_id, region_id, source_type, source_infrastructure_id, match_field, match_type, match_pattern, time_extract_regex, time_format, time_reference, instance_filter_json, aggregation_json, output_metric_json, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{objectCode}, #{objectName}, #{objectType}, #{envId}, #{regionId}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceInfrastructureId}, #{matchField}, #{matchType}, #{matchPattern}, #{timeExtractRegex}, #{timeFormat}, #{timeReference}, #{instanceFilterJson}, #{aggregationJson}, #{outputMetricJson}, #{enabled}, #{description}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update fp_logical_object set object_name = #{objectName}, object_type = #{objectType}, env_id = #{envId}, region_id = #{regionId}, source_type = #{sourceType}, source_infrastructure_id = #{sourceInfrastructureId}, match_field = #{matchField}, match_type = #{matchType}, match_pattern = #{matchPattern}, time_extract_regex = #{timeExtractRegex}, time_format = #{timeFormat}, time_reference = #{timeReference}, instance_filter_json = #{instanceFilterJson}, aggregation_json = #{aggregationJson}, output_metric_json = #{outputMetricJson}, enabled = #{enabled}, description = #{description}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
mapper.delete: delete from fp_logical_object where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
